why_v1: A value-heavy hand in position wins more by raising now than by settling for a passive line.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This value-heavy hand is strong enough to bet now and wins more by raising now than by settling for a passive line.
feedback_acceptable_v1: Acceptable. Calling keeps the hand in play, but this value-heavy hand wins more by raising now against weaker continues.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This value-heavy hand is strong enough to bet, so a passive line leaves value behind and gives up value while raising now wins more from weaker continues.
